violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee observed washing hands in a prep sink or service/mop sink. Observed food employee washing her hands in the 3 compartment sink during inspection. Hands should be washed at the designated hand washing station.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizing solution in bucket was found at 0ppm. Quaternary ammonia solutions should be 200ppm.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Can opener blade was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The walk-in cooler wire shelving units were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler floor was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
